plugins.name: kernel
plugins.description: Durable project memory, bounded JSON handoffs, engineering workflows, and independent verification for Claude Code and Codex. KERNEL 8.2.0 is a security release: a six-threat-class guard (self-destruct, exfiltration, scope-escape, supply-chain, sensitive-config writes, warn-only injection tripwire) with unforgeable one-time human approval replacing the DANGER_OK substring.
